title: Malmkraft - Ores & Resources
description: Malmkraft brings more ores and resources to your world for you to utilise.
body:
Malmkraft brings more ores and resources to your world for you to utilise.

As of now the mod contains:
- Three new resources: Malachite, Onyx and Bedrock Chunk (very rare).
- Malachite and Onyx armour, tools and blocks.
- End-game weapon: Antimatter Sword.
- 9 tiers of compressed cobblestone.

JEI is recommended for recipes!

More ores and materials are planned.

Made with MCreator.

All textures and models are made by me. No AI used.

You are not allowed to redistribute or host this mod or any of its files without permission. This mod is only available at CurseForge and Modrinth. If you find this mod anywhere else it could contain malicious code. Using footage of this mod or its files for AI training in any way is prohibited.

Feel free to use this mod in modpacks hosted on either CurseForge or Modrinth. Just make sure to give credit and link back to the mod on either CurseForge or Modrinth, and feel free to share your pack in the comments!

Also feel free to link videos using the mod!

This project on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/malmkraft-ores-resources)

Report issues there and not here.
